name: 🛠️ Project Deliverables Tracker
about: Track the execution of beginner, intermediate, or advanced projects in the roadmap.
title: 'Project: [Project Name]'
labels: project, development
assignees: ''
---

## 📋 Project Overview
* **Complexity**: [Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced]
* **Primary Stack**: [e.g., Python FastAPI + TypeScript React]
* **Target Path**: `projects/[project-folder]/`

---

## 🚀 Checklist & Tasks

### 📐 Setup & Planning
- [ ] Create project directory and copy [project-template.md](../../templates/project-template.md)
- [ ] Specify details and endpoints inside project spec

### 🛠️ Development & Coding
- [ ] Implement core functions / endpoints
- [ ] Solve compiler warnings & type safety checks
- [ ] Write basic verification scripts / test suite

### 📈 Completion & Review
- [ ] Verify requirements are met
- [ ] Document developer log / lessons in spec
- [ ] Update overall [PROGRESS.md](../../PROGRESS.md) and [PROJECTS.md](../../PROJECTS.md) status
